name: HomeBoy Repo
subtitle: Repository for the HomeBoy iOS app
description: An unofficial AltStore/Feather compatible source for the HomeBoy (homebox-catalog) iOS application.

apps.name: HomeBoy
apps.subtitle: Homebox Catalog iOS App
apps.localizedDescription: Rapid-input iPhone app for cataloguing items into a self-hosted Homebox instance. Designed with a clean Liquid Glass UI, offering smooth data entry, photo uploads, Tag management, and Location navigation.
